REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. DEMURRER CANNOT BE SUSTAINED ONLY TO A PART OF A CAUSE OF ACTION. ALL CAUSES OF ACTION ARE IN PART BASED ON ALLEGATIONS OF USE THAT ARE NOT ADDRESSED BY THE DEMURRER SPECIFICALLY (E.G. ARGUMENT REGARDING ILLEGALITY) AND ARE SUFFICIENT TO SUPPORT ALL STATED CAUSES OF ACTION (E.G. PARAGRAPHS 5(A), (C), (D), 11, ETC. DECLARATIONS FILED BY THE PARTIES ARE NOT CONSIDERED ON THIS DEMURRER. DEFENDANTS REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-03-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Demurrer cannot be sustained only to a part of a cause of action. All causes of action are in part based on allegations of use that are not addressed by the demurrer specifically (e.g. argument regarding illegality) and are sufficient to support all stated causes of action (e.g. paragraphs 5(a), (c), (d), 11, etc. Declarations filed by the parties are not considered on this demurrer. Defendants Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar Sep-03-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's Motion to Strike Demurrer is DENIED. Response to the Complaint was filed prior to any default being properly taken. No authority is cited for the proposition that the demurrer should be stricken under such circumstances. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
